meta.description: An open question needing resolution, used in Future State and Detailed Design documents.

assigneeId.description: UUID of the Person assigned to resolve this.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_a7f73f9e_7107_4beb_b636_73dddca69806" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "question" TEXT,
    "assignee_id" UUID,
    "answer" TEXT,
    "status" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_a7f73f9e_7107_4beb_b636_73dddca69806" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_a7f73f9e71074beb_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_a7f73f9e71074beb_assignee_id" FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES items(id)
)
